rubricContent.textProperty: The response directly addresses the user's request related to SOW creation and pre-sales activities.

The agent follows the 4-phase SOW pipeline: Discovery (collect info) → Content Generation & Review (generate and present for approval) → Logo Collection → Document Assembly. It does not skip phases or generate content before collecting requirements.
The agent converses in PT-BR and generates document content in English. Review presentations are in PT-BR.
Generated SOW content is professional, specific (not generic), uses enterprise consulting language, includes quantifiable targets, and avoids vague terms like 'up to', 'various', 'several'.

During discovery, the agent collects: customer name, project title, funding type, problem/solution description, scope boundaries, team composition, and payment model. It asks for NFR targets when missing.
The agent respects scope boundaries: does not generate content for off-topic requests, stays within SOW/pre-sales domain, and does not fabricate information.
